Traffic Light Controller
  • top
  • cfg_sync
  • Processes
  • p_mode_sync
  • View page source

p_mode_sync

Source file: cfg_sync.vhd
Source line: 80
Block type: process
Sensitivity list: sys_clk

Description

p_mode_sync: Two-flop synchroniser for mode_sel_r (cfg_clk → sys_clk). mode_sel_r is sampled twice in the sys_clk domain to resolve metastability before the signal is used by downstream logic.

Source

p_mode_sync : process(sys_clk) is
begin
    if rising_edge(sys_clk) then
        if sys_rst = '1' then
            mode_meta   <= '0';
            mode_sync_r <= '0';
        else
            mode_meta   <= mode_sel_r;
            mode_sync_r <= mode_meta;
        end if;
    end if;
end process p_mode_sync;
